metadata.title: Kanban — Private Boards, No Account Needed | switch-to.eu
metadata.description: Create private Kanban boards instantly. Organize tasks visually — encrypted and no sign-up required.

hero.title: Your boards
hero.subtitle: your privacy
hero.description: Create Kanban boards instantly — organize tasks, track progress, collaborate. No account, no tracking, end-to-end encrypted.

benefits.title: Why choose Kanban
benefits.description: Simple Kanban boards that respect your privacy

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: No tracking, no ads, no data mining. Your boards are encrypted in your browser before reaching our servers.

encrypted.title: End-to-End Encrypted
encrypted.description: Only people with the link can see your board. We can never read your data — not even if we wanted to.

cta.title: Try it now
cta.description: No signup, no spam, no tracking — just boards that work.

CreatePage.title: Create a New Board
CreatePage.subtitle: Give it a name and share the link with your team.
CreatePage.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Sprint Board, Project Tasks, Roadmap
CreatePage.terms: I understand that board data is encrypted and the link is the only way to access it. If I lose the link, the board cannot be recovered.
CreatePage.success: Board created! Share the link with others.
CreatePage.error: Failed to create board. Please try again.

BoardPage.emptyBoard: This board has no columns yet.
BoardPage.missingKeyDescription: This link is missing the encryption key. Please ask the board creator for the correct link.

cardDialog.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently remove this card. This action cannot be undone.

AdminPage.title: Board Admin
AdminPage.columnTitlePlaceholder: e.g. To Do, In Progress, Done
AdminPage.removeColumnConfirmDescription: This will permanently remove this column and all its cards. This action cannot be undone.
AdminPage.deleteBoardConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete the board and all its content. This action cannot be undone.

plotty.description: A privacy-first scheduling tool with end-to-end encryption. No accounts, no tracking, just simple scheduling.

listy.description: End-to-end encrypted shared lists. Groceries, potluck, tasks — no accounts needed, no tracking.

keepfocus.description: A privacy-first Pomodoro timer and task manager that runs entirely in your browser.
